author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat(hooks): introduce `useInstantSearch()` (algolia/react-instantsearch#3494)
body:
* feat(hooks): implement useInstantSearch

useInstantSearch is a new hook to access advanced functionality of InstantSearch without creating custom widgets:

- access to complete search results
- access to complete ui state
- functions to change the ui state
- refreshing the search results
- using middleware

* fun times feedback

* clarify in test, not a bug

* Apply suggestions from code review

Co-authored-by: François Chalifour <francoischalifour@users.noreply.github.com>

* Apply suggestions from code review

Co-authored-by: François Chalifour <francoischalifour@users.noreply.github.com>

* rename other useInstantSearch

* tests: simplify

* RIP useInstantSearch().search

* larger asserts

Co-authored-by: François Chalifour <francoischalifour@users.noreply.github.com>
